title: The SAT Alone Can't Fix the College Student Preparedness Problem
snippet: Ahmet Palazoglu, Chairman, University of California Academic Senate, Oakland, Calif. writes that improving college student preparedness also requires a clear focus on improving instruction across California's entire education system.
match_reason: websearch (op_ed) — Palazoglu is the named letter/op-ed author, signed as Chairman of the UC Academic Senate; the WSJ article it responds to explicitly mentions AI as a factor in the academic preparedness debate.

title: "Technologists who lead with human problems." — Ann Kirschner on the AI-never perspective
snippet: "Technologists who lead with human problems." Just capturing a critical phrase, a North Star. When I find myself bewildered by the AI-never perspective, this phrase should help refocus the dialog. Because we have lots of human problems. And some — can be eased with technology.
match_reason: social (social_post) — Ann Kirschner is the author of this LinkedIn post reflecting on AI adoption philosophy, posted from her own linkedin.com/in/annkirschner profile.

title: Plenary ICRA 2026 "A Tale of Two Cultures: Can Agentic Coding Close the Gap?" by Ken Goldberg
snippet: Plenary ICRA 2026 Tale of Two Cultures Ken Goldberg-hi-resolution. Ken Goldberg's plenary talk at IEEE ICRA 2026 in Vienna titled "A Tale of Two Cultures: Can Agentic Coding Close the Gap?" addressing AI and robotics.
match_reason: social (video) — Ken Goldberg is the named speaker in this ICRA 2026 plenary video about agentic coding and AI for robotics.

title: The Impact of AI on Learning Assessment
snippet: The 2026 EDUCAUSE Impact of AI on Learning Assessment Report, based on a survey of 438 faculty and staff, examines how AI is reshaping assessment design, academic integrity concerns, and instructional practice across higher education institutions.
match_reason: websearch (publication) — Major survey-based EDUCAUSE report on AI's effects on learning assessment and academic integrity directly relevant to the committee's teaching, learning, and assessment mandate.
